Notice Of Demurrer; Demurrer To First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A; Request For Judicial Notice In Non-California Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Clark Cameron, Esq. of Humphrey, Berger & Assoc., 818-871-0111 for defendants and moving parties MIKE MCCULLOUGH, EDWARD PAGE, OPTIMUM WINDOW MANUFACTURING CORP., MC2 SOLUTIONS, LLC, WINDORSKY, LLC
Kate Warner, Esq., 415-457-7977 for plaintiff and opposing party Lynne Crawford

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT MIKE MCCULLOUGH, EDWARD PAGE, OPTIMUM WINDOW MANUFACTURING CORP., MC2 SOLUTIONS, LLC, WINDORSKY, LLC'S Notice Of Demurrer; Demurrer To First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A; Request For Judicial Notice In Non-California Authorities. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 10. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7 SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS NOT A SEPERATE CAUSE OF ACTION AND THE THEORY AND REMEDY ARE ALREADY ENCOMPASSED IN ACTION 9. SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 11 WITH LEAVE TO ADD CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST TO THE PRAYER FOR RELIEF. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 12 BECAUSE CLAIMS FOR DAMAGES OR RESTITUTION IS NOT A CONVERSION. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 14 BECAUSE NO ACCOUNTING IS NECESSARY OR APPROPRIATE. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 15 WHICH STATES NO CLAIM. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
